eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Wisconsin; at 9:48 PM on APR 3, 2019 Effective until 10:48 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Wisconsin Statewide Required Monthly Test THIS IS A TEST MESSAGE FROM THE EMERGENCY ALERT SYSTEM ORIGINATING FROM THE STATE OF WISCONSIN EMERGENCY OPERATIONS CENTER. IF THIS HAD BEEN AN ACTUAL EMERGENCY, YOU WOULD HAVE BEEN GIVEN OFFICIAL INFORMATION, NEWS, OR INSTRUCTIONS. THIS TEST IS NOW CONCLUDED.
